title: jossinia buxifolia
intro: Jossinia buxifolia, a shrub-like plant native to Madagascar, is a member of the Rutaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oils, which exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Jossinia buxifolia include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Jossinia buxifolia typically involve the use of its leaves and essential oils in teas, infusions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
